payload.long_description: Low, light-beige wooden side table with a rectangular top and a lower shelf (two-tier), varnished surface with slight wear/staining visible; the right side of the table is edge-cropped/partially cut off in the image; appears to be a small, low piece of furniture about 1.2 m from the camera.
